name: NoCodeReviewed - Intelligence Vault Evidence Pipeline v1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: $json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.1, responseMimeType: 'application/json' } } }}

meta.description: Webhook pipeline that turns submitted evidence or research notes into public evidence files, tool scores, quality gate records, and draft review/comparison pages in Supabase.
